home.hero_subtitle: We connect people already traveling with people who need to send things. No couriers, no bureaucracy, real guarantees.
home.search_title: Where do you need to send?
home.step1_desc: Sets origin, destination, date and available space. Receives packages at their verified address.
home.step2_desc: Search by route and date, check the traveler's profile and level, send your request with package photos.
home.step3_desc: Receiver scans QR on arrival. Payment releases automatically. Everything recorded.
home.level_basic_desc: Verified identity and address. Ideal for low-value packages.
home.level_mid_desc: Adds item guarantee and escrow. Can purchase on request.
home.level_pro_desc: Enabled office or home address. Frequent routes. Medium-high value packages.
home.level_elite_desc: Verified address in two countries. Maximum trust. Logistics agent.
home.guarantee_desc: Payment stays in escrow until the receiver confirms delivery. Nobody can keep your money.
home.legal_note: Each traveler is responsible for complying with customs legislation in the destination country. Traficante does not promote or take responsibility for the transport of illegal items.
